situation: audit-2026-07-04-016 finding M03: parallel-dispatch.sh L54 used `for TASK_ID in $(python3 ...)` which word-splits on whitespace/special chars in task IDs. Malformed or adversarial plan.json could cause branch name injection, path traversal, or silent task skipping.
action: Replaced newline-delimited for-loop with NUL-delimited while-read loop (`read -r -d ''`) fed by python3 process substitution outputting NUL-separated task IDs. Added regex validation (`^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$`) to reject unsafe IDs before use in branch names and filesystem paths.
